form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a one length second but did clock a swift 22.18 over the 390m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (23.46) at big odds over 410m at Horsham. Has a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.35) when second at this track in a Grade 5 H. Has two successes and two minors from eight starts from box 3. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (24.56) over 435m at Sale. Awkward draw to overcome. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Lost ground in home straight.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by a neck at Geelong (22.60) beating Star Fury in a Grade 4/5 on March 28. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by a neck at Geelong (22.60) beating Star Fury in a Grade 4/5 on March 28. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (25.45) at Warrnambool over 450m. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with him.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 5 lengths at Warragul over 400m (22.52) beating Peaky Avenger in Grade 4/5 on March 31. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 2.25 lengths sixth (24.54) over 425m at Bendigo. Hard to have this time.
